description: Practice-habit tracker for solo musicians — log daily practice sessions across instruments and skills, build streaks, and review progress in a card-catalog grid

pages.name: dashboard
pages.description: Today's practice overview with a grid of habit cards covering each practice routine
components: Top bar with the app name on the left, a center segmented control (Today / Week / Month), and a right cluster showing current streak count with a flame icon, a metronome quick-toggle, and a user avatar
Greeting strip with the date, a one-line motivational message, and three inline stats: minutes practiced today, sessions logged, and weekly goal progress bar
Card-catalog grid (three per row) of practice-habit cards — each card has instrument name, icon, target minutes, a circular progress ring, 'Start session' button, streak chip, and a seven-day dot row
Floating action button at the bottom-right labeled '+ Log session' for quick manual entry

animations.element: Current streak counter with flame icon in the right cluster of the top bar

pages.name: habit-detail
pages.description: Detail view for a single practice habit — history, technique focus, and session log
components: Header card with the habit name, instrument icon, current streak, longest streak, total hours logged lifetime, and an 'Edit habit' link
Heatmap calendar grid showing the past twelve weeks of practice — each cell is a day, colored by minutes practiced, with a legend underneath
Technique focus panel listing the current focus areas (e.g. 'Sight reading', 'Scales: D minor', 'Tempo: 92 bpm') as checkable chips with a 'Mark mastered' affordance per chip
Session log table below — columns for date, duration, tempo range, focus area, mood emoji, and notes preview, with the latest session at the top
Right-rail recordings panel listing the last five audio takes attached to this habit — each row shows take title, duration, waveform thumbnail, and a play button

animations.element: Heatmap calendar grid of the past twelve weeks in the upper section of the page

pages.name: session
pages.description: Active practice session screen with a metronome, tuner, and live timer
components: Session header with the habit name, target duration, and a 'Pause' / 'End session' button pair
Large circular timer in the center showing elapsed time, surrounded by a progress ring filling toward the target
Metronome panel below the timer — tempo readout in bpm, increment and decrement controls, time-signature selector, accent toggle, and a beat-indicator row of dots
Tuner strip showing detected pitch, cents-off needle, and reference note dropdown
Side notes column for jotting in-session observations, with a tempo-checkpoint list that auto-records each tempo change with a timestamp

animations.element: Large circular timer with progress ring in the center of the session screen

pages.name: library
pages.description: Full catalog of every practice habit the user has created, browsable and filterable
components: Page header with the title 'Practice library', a habit count, and a primary '+ New habit' button

Filter bar with a search input, instrument-family dropdown (Strings, Keys, Winds, Voice, Production), tag chips (Technique, Repertoire, Theory, Improv), and a sort dropdown (Recently practiced, Longest streak, Alphabetical)

Card catalog grid (four per row) of habit cards — each card shows instrument icon, habit name, tag chips, weekly target, current streak, last-practiced relative date, and a small sparkline of the past four weeks
Archived section at the bottom — a collapsible row of muted cards for paused or retired habits, each with a 'Reactivate' link

animations.element: Primary '+ New habit' button in the page header

pages.name: insights
pages.description: Weekly and monthly progress review with charts and milestones
components: Hero summary banner with the week range, total practice hours, week-over-week change percentage, and a 'Share recap' button
Row of four KPI cards: average session length, most-practiced habit, days hit goal, new personal bests count
Stacked-bar chart showing daily practice minutes for the past four weeks, segmented by habit, with a legend mapping color swatches to habit names
Milestones list — entries for streak anniversaries, hour thresholds crossed, and technique masteries, each with a date, badge icon, and one-line description

animations.element: Hero summary banner with week range and total practice hours at the top of the page

pages.name: settings
components: Page heading 'Settings' with a vertical sidebar of section links (Profile, Practice defaults, Instruments, Notifications, Data & export)
Profile section card with avatar upload, display name input, primary instrument dropdown, and timezone selector
Practice defaults card — default session length stepper, default metronome bpm, default tuning reference pitch, and a 'Count rest days toward streaks' toggle
Notifications card with a daily-reminder time picker, day-of-week checkboxes, and toggles for streak-at-risk alerts and weekly recap email
Action bar at the bottom with a 'Save changes' primary button and a 'Discard' secondary button

animations.element: Page heading 'Settings' at the top of the content area
